script: No one sits down to feel grief poetically

props.quote: No one sits down to feel grief poetically. It arrives unannounced, in the wrong font.

script: grief has always been poetry's country

props.headline: Grief has always been poetry's country
props.subtext: IT ARRIVES IN THE WRONG FONT

script: You don't miss a person. You miss how they said your name

lines: You miss how they said your name.

script: The exact pitch of their laugh at something stupid

lines: The exact pitch of their laugh

script: Facts tell you what happened. Poetry tells you what stayed behind

props.quote: Facts tell you what happened. Poetry tells you what stayed behind after it happened.

script: people reach for poems at funerals and not spreadsheets

props.quote: It's the reason people reach for poems at funerals and not spreadsheets.
